## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Alex AI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, review blog posts, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 blog posts ready for review/publishing this week; aiming for 5 posts/week going forward](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Feedback on blog post content and competitor mentions provided; adjustments to be made](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [New image generation workflow introduced; abstract style requested for blog headers](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [TechCrunch article coming next week expected to boost domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Feedback

  - ["Bias in AI Recruiting" and "Best AI Recruiting Tools" ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [One article staged for publishing this week](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Feedback on competitor mentions: include Hey Milo, Eightfold, SenseHQ, and Converse AI](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Distinction made between recruiting and staffing tools for future articles](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Content Production Scaling

  - [Current goal: 5 blog posts per week](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [8 total posts including work so far](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Publishing in batches; not an issue from SEO standpoint](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Performance tracking to begin next week](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [Domain authority currently at 5/100](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Mix of low-volume, low-difficulty keywords to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Expect 2-4 weeks to see impact on traffic, 6 weeks for consistent upward trend](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### Domain Authority Improvement

  - [Upcoming TechCrunch article expected to boost authority](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [PR, funding announcements, and backlinks from reputable sources help](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Potential strategy: Create high-quality statistic compilation posts for organic backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### Image Generation Workflow

  - [New workflow introduced based on existing blog imagery](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Feedback: More abstract style requested, similar to homepage redesign](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Current images to be used for immediate publishing, then replaced later](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)

  - [New articles already in production](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Donald to review Nathalie's responses to comments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/31epdJonx9izmc5e_qKdfL1RT5p_ZR8K?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
